name: adult small bites lamb meal & brown rice recipe dog food
description: hill's science diet small bites adult dry dog food is specially formulated to fuel the energy needs of dogs during the prime of their life. delicious lamb flavor for those that prefer variety & made with high quality, easy-to-digest ingredients in a small bite size. contains activbiome+ multi-benefit, a special blend of prebiotic fibers and antioxidants to support digestion, immune system and organ health healthy skin & coat with omega-6 & vitamin e lean muscles supported with high-quality protein
